untranslatable_reason: The 'Dark Cloud Cover' pattern requires detection of 'lower peaks and lower valleys' which cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators. This requires multi-bar pattern recognition logic (identifying a series of lower highs and lower lows) that exceeds the capabilities of single-bar indicator comparisons. Volume trend data provided is incomplete (table cut off).
translation_notes: Approximated using ADX for trend confirmation and close < prev_close for downward momentum. True Dark Cloud Cover detection requires candlestick pattern recognition beyond allowed indicators. Exit condition set to close above SMA_20 as reasonable reversal. Volume statistics partially illegible in source.
